commits: 8fabb19f: feat(ux): implement Phase 2 screen framework and navigation (#600)
message: Phase 2 TDD implementation complete. 9 tasks implemented: Header 5-screen navigation, GlobalMobileNav bottom tabs, AppShell useLayoutConfig integration, Home page redesign with session summary + shortcut cards, Sessions page, Repositories page, Review page with ReviewCard + SimpleMessageInput, More page, auth middleware tests for 4 new URLs. 43 new tests added across 7 new test files. All 304 test files (5818 tests) pass with 0 failures. 0 ESLint errors, 0 TypeScript errors.
